title: centaurea costae
intro: Centaurea costae, also known as Costae's knapweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Centaurea costae include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Centaurea costae can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine practices.
